recommendations.title: Viral
recommendations.overview: Following the outbreak of a virus that wipes out the majority of the human population, a young woman documents her family's new life in quarantine and tries to protect her infected sister.

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity 3
recommendations.overview: In 1988, young sisters Katie and Kristi befriend an invisible entity who resides in their home.

recommendations.title: Secret Headquarters
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction, Family
recommendations.overview: While hanging out after school, Charlie and his friends discover the headquarters of the world’s most powerful superhero hidden beneath his home. When villains attack, they must team up to defend the headquarters and save the world.

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity 4
recommendations.overview: It has been five years since the disappearance of Katie and Hunter, and a suburban family witness strange events in their neighborhood when a woman and a mysterious child move in.

recommendations.title: Nerve

recommendations.title: Catfish
recommendations.overview: Nev, a 24-year-old New York-based photographer, has no idea what he's in for when Abby, an eight-year-old girl from rural Michigan, contacts him on Facebook, seeking permission to paint one of his photographs. When he receives her remarkable painting

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: The Matrix Reloaded

recommendations.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
recommendations.overview: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers. The heroic Mighty Pups are on a roll to super-save the day.

recommendations.title: No Mercy
recommendations.overview: An unconventional undercover Chicago cop and his partner are recruited to commit the murder of a New Orleans criminal kingpin.
